# TEMS AURA - Copilot Instructions

<!-- Use this file to provide workspace-specific custom instructions to Copilot. For more details, visit https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/copilot-customization#_use-a-githubcopilotinstructionsmd-file -->

## Project Overview
This is a luxury fashion designer website for TEMS AURA - a soft luxury custom clothing brand.

## Design System
- **Brand Style**: Soft luxury, ultra-feminine, elegant, professional
- **Color Palette**: Blush pink (#F4C2C2, #FFE5E5), Nude beige (#F5E6D3), Soft gold (#D4AF37, #FFD700), White (#FFFFFF)
- **Typography**: 
  - Logo: Playfair Display Italic (bold, colorful)
  - Headings: Playfair Display (bold serif)
  - Body: Inter (clean sans-serif)
- **UI Elements**: Soft shadows, rounded corners, elegant spacing, smooth transitions

## Technical Stack
- **Framework**: Next.js 15 with App Router
- **Styling**: TailwindCSS with custom luxury theme
- **CMS**: Decap CMS (Netlify CMS)
- **Forms**: Netlify Forms
- **Deployment**: Netlify
- **Language**: TypeScript

## Key Features
1. Custom order form with detailed measurements
2. Gallery with CMS control
3. Social media promotion features
4. Responsive mobile-first design
5. SEO optimization
6. Netlify Identity authentication for CMS

## Code Guidelines
- Use TypeScript for type safety
- Implement responsive design (mobile-first)
- Add smooth animations and transitions
- Ensure accessibility (ARIA labels, semantic HTML)
- Optimize images and performance
- Follow Next.js 15 best practices
- Use Tailwind custom classes for brand colors
- Keep components modular and reusable
